# Compliance Note

## Background

The operations team wants a short note describing how sample employees should record approvals for a recurring internal process.

## Draft Note

Team members should record the request date, approver name, approval decision, and any exception rationale in the approved tracking system. The note does not create new legal obligations and is limited to internal recordkeeping.

## Open Items

The process owner should confirm whether the same approval evidence is required for renewals.
